# James Kim

james.kim@email.com | (206) 555-0418 | linkedin.com/in/jameskim | jameskim.design

## Senior UX Designer

User-centered designer with 7 years of experience creating intuitive digital products for enterprise and consumer audiences. Led design systems, conducted 200+ user research sessions, and shipped features used by millions. Passionate about accessibility and inclusive design.

## Work Experience

### Senior UX Designer | Airbnb
*05/2022 – Present*

- Redesigned the host onboarding flow through 3 rounds of usability testing with 45 participants, reducing drop-off rate by 34% and increasing new host activations by 2,800 per month
- Led creation of a unified design system with 120+ components in Figma, adopted across 8 product teams and reducing design-to-dev handoff time by 50%
- Conducted competitive analysis and user interviews for new pricing transparency feature, resulting in design that improved guest booking confidence score from 62% to 84%
- Mentored 3 junior designers through weekly portfolio reviews and design critiques, with 2 receiving promotions within 12 months

### UX Designer | Spotify
*03/2019 – 04/2022*

- Designed collaborative playlist experience that reached 15M monthly active users within 6 months of launch, becoming one of the top 3 most-used social features
- Led accessibility audit of core player interface, identifying and resolving 47 WCAG 2.1 violations and improving screen reader compatibility to 98%
- Facilitated 25 user research sessions including contextual inquiries and diary studies to inform redesign of podcast discovery, increasing podcast starts by 23%
- Created interactive prototypes in Framer for A/B testing, enabling product team to validate 12 design concepts before engineering investment

### Junior UX Designer | REI
*08/2017 – 02/2019*

- Redesigned product detail pages for e-commerce platform, improving add-to-cart rate by 19% through simplified information hierarchy and larger product imagery
- Built and maintained UI pattern library in Sketch with 60+ reusable components, ensuring visual consistency across web and mobile platforms
- Conducted 30+ moderated usability tests for checkout flow redesign, identifying 8 critical pain points that informed iterative improvements reducing cart abandonment by 12%
